title: Delicate Russian Pilaf
description: A flavorful pilaf dish with delicate and flaky textures, inspired by Russian cuisine. This simple recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large saucepan, sauté the chopped onion and pepper in a small amount of oil until tender.
Add the homemade pilaf to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with flaky biscuits.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the biscuits are golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
